info.title: MONEO Sensor Dashboard

get.description: Return a 12-point downsampled value array for each requested sensor.

put.description:
Update the normal / warning / critical threshold bands for a sensor.
Requires admin or operator role.

get.description: Debug proxy: fetch the latest processdata reading for a sensor via /processdata.

schema.title: Response Get Moneo Sensor Latest Api Moneo Sensors  Sensor Id  Latest Get

get.description:
Debug proxy: fetch one page of historical processdata readings for a sensor.

Returns the full MONEO envelope — {pageNumber, pageSize, totalPages, totalCount, data} —
so callers can detect how many pages remain and request subsequent pages.

parameters.name: from_datetime

schema.description: Start of the time range (ISO 8601, UTC).

parameters.description: Start of the time range (ISO 8601, UTC).

schema.description: End of the time range (ISO 8601, UTC).
schema.title: To Datetime

parameters.description: End of the time range (ISO 8601, UTC).

parameters.name: page_size

schema.description: Number of readings per page (default 500, max 2 147 483 647).
schema.title: Page Size

parameters.description: Number of readings per page (default 500, max 2 147 483 647).

Run the poll loop for exactly one sensor and return a detailed trace.
Does NOT create a SyncRun row — health surface data is not polluted.
